import re

filepath = r"C:/Users/CHIZOBA-TEMP-PC/Documents/e-shop/src/pages/TestimonialsPage.jsx"

with open\(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Locate the start marker
start_marker = '\\t\\t\\t\\t{/* Featured Testimonial */}'
# Locate the end marker \(the closing \)} just before {/* Grid of testimonials */}\)
end_marker = '\\n\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t{/* Grid of testimonials */}'

start_idx = content.find\(start_marker\)
end_idx = content.find\(end_marker\)

if start_idx == -1:
    print\("ERROR: start_marker not found"\)
elif end_idx == -1:
    print\("ERROR: end_marker not found"\)
else:
    print\(f"start_idx={start_idx}, end_idx={end_idx}"\)
    # Show the exact text that will be replaced
    old_block = content[start_idx:end_idx]
    print\(f"--- OLD BLOCK \(first 200 chars\) ---"\)
    print\(repr\(old_block[:200]\)\)
    print\(f"--- OLD BLOCK \(last 100 chars\) ---"\)
    print\(repr\(old_block[-100:]\)\)
PYEOF)

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\CHIZOBA-TEMP-PC\\Documents\\e-shop" && node -e "
const fs = require\('fs'\);
const content = fs.readFileSync\('src/lib/bookedSlotsService.js', 'utf8'\);

const addition = \\`\\r
export async function addToWaitlist\({ date, name, email, phone, uid }\) {\\r
  const ref = collection\(db, 'waitlist'\);\\r
  return addDoc\(ref, {\\r
    date,\\r
    name,\\r
    email: email || '',\\r
    phone: phone || '',\\r
    uid: uid || '',\\r
    status: 'waiting',\\r
    createdAt: serverTimestamp\(\),\\r
  }\);\\r
}\\r
\\r
export async function fetchWaitlistByDate\(date\) {\\r
  const ref = collection\(db, 'waitlist'\);\\r
  const q = query\(ref, where\('date', '==', date\), where\('status', '==', 'waiting'\)\);\\r
  const snap = await getDocs\(q\);\\r
  return snap.docs.map\(\(d\) => \({ id: d.id, ...d.data\(\) }\)\);\\r
}\\r
\\r
export async function fetchAllWaitlist\(\) {\\r
  const ref = collection\(db, 'waitlist'\);\\r
  const q = query\(ref, where\('status', '==', 'waiting'\)\);\\r
  const snap = await getDocs\(q\);\\r
  return snap.docs.map\(\(d\) => \({ id: d.id, ...d.data\(\) }\)\).sort\(\(a, b\) => {\\r
    const ta = a.createdAt?.seconds || 0;\\r
    const tb = b.createdAt?.seconds || 0;\\r
    return tb - ta;\\r
  }\);\\r
}\\r
\\`;

const updated = content.trimEnd\(\) + addition;
fs.writeFileSync\('src/lib/bookedSlotsService.js', updated\);
console.log\('SUCCESS'\);
")
